name: pocket-mint

scripts.backend: cd apps && cd backend && npm run dev
scripts.frontend: cd apps && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.install: cd apps && cd backend && npm install && cd .. && cd frontend && npm install

description: A **full‑stack expense tracker** built with **Next.js** for the frontend, **Express** (Node.js) for the backend API, and **Prisma** as the ORM for a SQLite/PostgreSQL database. The application lets users add, view, and manage their financial transactions in a clean dashboard.
